landing.recipesActionAria: Create an account to organize recipes
landing.pantryActionAria: Create an account to track your pantry
landing.shoppingActionAria: Create an account to simplify shopping
auth.login.title: Log in to Kotlet
auth.login.intro: Continue planning meals and keeping your recipes together.
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.register.intro: Keep your menus and recipes available whenever you need them.
auth.register.error: Unable to create the account. Please try again.
auth.logout.error: Unable to log out. Please try again.
landing.eyebrow: A calmer way to run your kitchen
landing.title: Good food starts with a kitchen that
landing.intro: Keep your recipes, pantry, meal plans, and shopping list in one thoughtful place—so you can spend less time organizing and more time cooking.
landing.value: Everything your kitchen needs, connected in one place
landing.featuresTitle: From “what should we eat?” to dinner on the table.
landing.featuresIntro: Kotlet keeps the small decisions connected, so planning food at home feels lighter every day.
landing.recipesText: Save family favorites and new discoveries with ingredients, instructions, and photos in one easy-to-find collection.
landing.pantryText: See what’s in the pantry at a glance and spot what’s running low before it becomes a last-minute surprise.
landing.shoppingTitle: A shopping list that makes sense
landing.shoppingText: Keep one clear list with quantities and prices, check items off as you shop, and stay focused on what you actually need.
landing.closingText: Bring your kitchen together with a tool designed around the way home cooking actually works.
landing.footer: Thoughtfully made for everyday home cooking.
settings.intro: Manage how you appear in Kotlet and keep your account secure.
settings.profileHelp: This name is shown across the app.
settings.profileError: Unable to save your profile. Please try again.
settings.passwordHelp: Choose a strong password you do not use elsewhere.
settings.passwordError: Unable to change your password. Please try again.
shopping.intro: Add what you need and keep the expected cost under control.
shopping.priceHelp: Prices are taken from the ingredient catalogue.
shopping.empty: Your shopping list is empty. Add an ingredient above.
admin.intro: Manage users and integrations for Kotlet.
admin.usersHelp: Update account details or remove access. Passwords are never shown.
admin.deleteConfirm: Remove {name}? This action cannot be undone.
home.setup.title: Set up your home
home.setup.intro: Create a home to start organizing your kitchen, or accept an invitation to join an existing one.
home.setup.createHelp: Give your household a name. You can invite others later.
home.setup.createError: Unable to create the home. Please try again.
home.invite.title: Invite members
home.invite.help: Invite people by the email they use to log in. They will see a pending invitation to accept.
home.manage.deleteHelp: Deleting this home removes its pantry, shopping list and all associated data for everyone. Members keep their accounts.
home.manage.deleteConfirm: Delete this home and all of its data? This cannot be undone.
home.manage.noHome: You don't have an active home.
home.switch.label: Your homes
